title: justicia anfractuosa
intro: Justicia anfractuosa, also known as the crepe gentian or twisted justicia, is a flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Justicia anfractuosa can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion to harness its medicinal properties and is often used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
